title: 40 Inch Hot Pink Number 10 Balloon 16p12'' Happy 10th Birthday Balloons for Boy/Girls Birthday Decorations10 Year Old, Large Foil Number Balloon Latex Digital Balloons for Him Her 10th Birthday Party
features: 【10th Birthday Party Decorations】 - 40 inch 1 and 0 oversized foil balloons numbers, 16*12 inch very high quality Birthday Decorations balloons (8*Rose with gold age print balloons, 8*Rose confetti with black age print balloons) Free random 1 roll of ribbons, is the best choice to Balloons Party Decorations enhance the birthday atmosphere in the party!

【Quality Material】-- Happy 10th Birthday Balloons is aluminium foil , beautiful ball shape, safe and non-toxic. Confetti Latex Balloons and digital prints balloons on the other hand, are made of high quality natural latex, non-toxic, harmless, thicker and more durable.

【Hot Pink Theme】-- Hot Pink Number 10 Balloon birthday decorations designed for her or your party. The beautiful colour adds full atmosphere to the 10th birthday party and impresses your guests and friends!

【Easy And Reusable】-- Digital balloons can be inflated with air or helium, no skill is needed, decorating your party is easy and convenient, after use, the gas in the balloon can be released, easy to store and reuse, the aluminium foil material reflects the light to make the balloons even more beautiful, providing the perfect display for your party, these aluminium foil balloons and latex balloons are sturdy and durable, you can hang these balloons from ceilings ceiling, mounted on walls and windows, or used as table centrepieces to decorate your various parties. TIP: Colourful confetti will stick to the balloons by rubbing them with your clothes or hair before inflation.

【Warm Tips】-- In order to achieve the floating effect, helium is required. Please note that helium is not included in the package. Avoid over-inflation and keep away from sunlight, heat and sharp objects to prevent bursting. Secure the balloon tail after tying for longer durability
description: Safety Warning 1. Not suitable for children under 6 years, For use under adult supervision. 2. To avoid danger of suffocation, Keep this bag & balloons away from babies and children.
